scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev ./dist
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy ./dist --project-name american-innovations-group
scripts.db:local: wrangler d1 execute aig_db --local --file=./schema/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute aig_db --local --file=./schema/seeds.sql
scripts.db:remote: wrangler d1 execute aig_db --remote --file=./schema/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute aig_db --remote --file=./schema/seeds.sql
